title: Leo's Craftable Sponges
description: Leo's Craftable Sponges adds Craftable sponges To the game, in a way that isn't to in the way or way to easy to craft.
body:
**Craftable Sponges was made for one purpose, Crafting sponges.**



## Why was this made?



Craftable Sponges was made after the fact that i couldn't find any "Craftable Sponges" which actually made sense in a way, so i made my own.

(Mostly made because im lazy)



## Recipes

First you need to make a Paper Base, you can do this by Placing one String and surrounding it with Paper. (this is the paper base)

![Paper Base Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e06caeaf629a25c8b8e7f5ef3564870ee8252b2a.png)

Second you need to make the Absorber Base, you can make this using 3 Dried Kelp and putting a Diorite block in one of the four slots, (like how you make a crafting table). 

![Absorber Base Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/618d593fa2223944a141a84e04f2d4464949c400.png)

Third and the last step of the process (at least for recipes), is making the sponge itself. You can do this by Placing the Paper Base in the middle, and then putting 4 Absorber base's in the corners, then you need to put sugar cane in the rest of the slots, (3x3 crafting). 

![Wet Sponge Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b997b071dfcc244596d48214291d22aef1a98c1e.png)

Now don't get dissapointed when you get wet sponges. as you did use Sugar cane After all.



**Might update the mod to later versions if i feel like it, but it already has everything you need.**
